title: HCP Humanitarian Query
description: Machine-readable structural definition of a humanitarian Query conforming to HCP-0011 Query Model version 0.4.

type.description: Type of living being described by the humanitarian Query.

reported_label.description: Human-readable label known or reported by the person initiating the search. It does not imply verified identity.

estimated_age.description: Approximate age associated with a human Subject. This field is not applicable to animal Subjects.

recognition_features.description: Free-text description of observable characteristics remembered or known by the person initiating the search.
examples: Blue jacket, small black backpack, gray hair
Light brown coat, red collar, white patch on chest

event_type.description: Canonical language-independent Event Type associated with the humanitarian situation being searched. Unknown future Event Types remain structurally valid.

reported_location.description: Free-text description of the location associated with the humanitarian evidence currently known.
